'''lovayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:weaky|weaky]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weaky|weaky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lovayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovayithi|lovayithi]] || [[word:lovayiji|lovayiji]] || [[word:lovayishi|lovayishi]] || [[word:lovayiki|lovayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovayuthuthu|lovayuthuthu]] || [[word:lovayujuju|lovayujuju]] || [[word:lovayushushu|lovayushushu]] || [[word:lovayukuku|lovayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovayuthu|lovayuthu]] || [[word:lovayuju|lovayuju]] || [[word:lovayushu|lovayushu]] || [[word:lovayuku|lovayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovayufthuf|lovayufthuf]] || [[word:lovayufjuf|lovayufjuf]] || [[word:lovayufshuf|lovayufshuf]] || [[word:lovayufkuf|lovayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovayethe|lovayethe]] || [[word:lovayeje|lovayeje]] || [[word:lovayeshe|lovayeshe]] || [[word:lovayeke|lovayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovayothotho|lovayothotho]] || [[word:lovayojojo|lovayojojo]] || [[word:lovayoshosho|lovayoshosho]] || [[word:lovayokoko|lovayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovayotho|lovayotho]] || [[word:lovayojo|lovayojo]] || [[word:lovayosho|lovayosho]] || [[word:lovayoko|lovayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovayofthof|lovayofthof]] || [[word:lovayofjof|lovayofjof]] || [[word:lovayofshof|lovayofshof]] || [[word:lovayofkof|lovayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfthÃŸf|lovayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfjÃŸf|lovayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfshÃŸf|lovayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfkÃŸf|lovayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lovayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lovayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lovayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lovayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfthÃŸf|lovayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfjÃŸf|lovayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfshÃŸf|lovayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfkÃŸf|lovayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfthÃŸf|lovayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfjÃŸf|lovayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfshÃŸf|lovayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lovayÃŸfkÃŸf|lovayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovayÃḊthÃḊ|lovayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lovayÃḊjÃḊ|lovayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lovayÃḊshÃḊ|lovayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lovayÃḊkÃḊ|lovayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovayathatha|lovayathatha]] || [[word:lovayajaja|lovayajaja]] || [[word:lovayashasha|lovayashasha]] || [[word:lovayakaka|lovayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovayatha|lovayatha]] || [[word:lovayaja|lovayaja]] || [[word:lovayasha|lovayasha]] || [[word:lovayaka|lovayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovayafthaf|lovayafthaf]] || [[word:lovayafjaf|lovayafjaf]] || [[word:lovayafshaf|lovayafshaf]] || [[word:lovayafkaf|lovayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lovayasha|lovayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lovayshÃḋsha|lovayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lovayrosha|lovayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lovaymusha|lovaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lovayasha|lovayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golovaynkshÃḋsha|golovaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golovaynkrosha|golovaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golovaynkmusha|golovaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golovaynkyasha|golovaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lovavayasha|lovavayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lovavayshÃḋsha|lovavayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lovavayrosha|lovavayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lovavaymusha|lovavaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lovavayasha|lovavayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golovavaynkshÃḋsha|golovavaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golovavaynkrosha|golovavaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golovavaynkmusha|golovavaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golovavaynkyasha|golovavaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:levÃḊyasha|levÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:levÃḊyshÃḋsha|levÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:levÃḊyrosha|levÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:levÃḊymusha|levÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:levÃḊyasha|levÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golevÃḊynkshÃḋsha|golevÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golevÃḊynkrosha|golevÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golevÃḊynkmusha|golevÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golevÃḊynkyasha|golevÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lovfayasha|lovfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lovfayshÃḋsha|lovfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lovfayrosha|lovfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lovfaymusha|lovfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lovfayasha|lovfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golovfaynkshÃḋsha|golovfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golovfaynkrosha|golovfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golovfaynkmusha|golovfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golovfaynkyasha|golovfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
